title: Ability to view columns data instead of just "Item Name" and labels in Calendar View
excerpt:
Description

posts.author: onz (Renato)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

It would be very interesting to me to be able to view directly in Calendar View some column data. For instance, I have entries with Customer Name (label) and quantity (numbers). I also created a formula that joins both of them as text.
In Calendar View by default I only see “Item name” in each Date, working with “Label by” I can add the Customer name (which is a Label) but I can’t add the Quantity (which is a Numbers) or the Formula I created.

What are you trying to achieve

I am trying to see data from different columns in Calendar View instead of just Item Name.

posts.author: Marlene (Marlene)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

yes, this would be definetly a life change for our logistic teams. We would be able to see in calendar view how many palettes are previwed to get in the wherehouse each day
